title: hieracium vulgatum subsp. fastigiatum
intro: Hieracium vulgatum subsp. fastigiatum is a subspecies of the lesser hawkweed, a flowering plant in the dandelion family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly its diuretic and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Hieracium vulgatum subsp. fastigiatum include its ability to help with digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate joint pain. The herbal preparations of this plant include tea, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
